intent: Write a 3-source research memo on 'sleep tech and the evidence behind common purchases'. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse the electronics and health-household categories and collect at least 4 sleep-tech products (white-noise machine, sleep mask, mattress topper, sunrise alarm). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/science AND /f/LifeProTips for posts on sleep-aid evidence, placebo, or real-world habits. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. (3) Wikipedia — open 'Sleep hygiene' and 'White noise' (or similar) and extract 3-4 facts. The report must: (a) present storefront picks with stats, (b) tier each by evidence strength, (c) integrate community experiences, (d) close with one $60 kit plus three free habits. Cite every claim.
